channel.title: Go Humble! RSS BOOKS
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle books bundles!

item.title: The Boys: The Grand Finale by Dynamite
item.description: The Boys are back for one final fight
item.content:encoded: Bloody good graphic novels are here—follow the gruesome adventures of Billy Butcher, Starlight, A-Train, and The Boys as they take on Vought and Homelander with The Boys: The Grand Finale Bundle by Dynamite Comics! This collection of graphic novels is not for the faint of heart—but if you enjoy hyper-violence, action, suspense, and a gritty take on the superhero genre, then this series is for you. Don’t wait another second—pay what you want for the complete main story and the hottest additional content like The Boys: Dear Becky #1–8.

item.title: Guitars and More for Dummies by Wiley
item.content:encoded: So, life has delivered you a guitar you have no clue how to play. Don’t worry, we’ve all been there—especially the folks at Wiley, who tuned up a fantastic bundle of their “For Dummies” instruction books for all the guitar newbies who just want to jam! This collection of ebooks includes lessons on specifics like bass and blues, rulebooks about theory, rhythm, and music composition, and even an entire book all about amps and effects for those times you want to get really creative. So, grab that guitar that’s been gathering dust in your closet and pick up a new skill with this 18-ebook bundle, available for the price of your choosing! Every purchase supports Music Will’s mission to bring music education to students everywhere.

item.title: Linux, the Good Stuff by No Starch
item.content:encoded: Looking for more freedom from your operating system? Learn how to bend Linux to your will and create without limits with this awesome tech bundle that focuses on the good stuff. Our curated library of courses, in conjunction with No Starch Press, includes exclusive early access to The Linux Memory Manager and Heavy Wizardry 101, alongside System Programming in Linux; Linux Basics for Hackers, 2nd edition; How Linux Works, 3rd edition; and more. Pay what you want and help support the Electronic Frontier Foundation with your purchase!

item.title: The Collected Peanuts by Fantagraphics
item.description: All of Peanuts in one place?? Good grief!
item.content:encoded: Put on your zigzag t-shirt and grab your football, because we’ve collected every Peanuts comic book and strip into one bundle courtesy of Fantagraphics! This bundle of Peanuts books includes The Complete Peanuts spanning 1953 to 2000, the omnibus series of recolored classic strips Peanuts Every Sunday, the Peanuts Game Day Collection of comics for the sports fan in your life, collected strips like Snoopy vs. the Red Baron, and graphic novels like Batter Up, Charlie Brown! Get all the Peanuts your heart desires in one bundle—and, most importantly, every purchase at the price of your choice helps people in need find their Snoopy by supporting Canine Companions!

item.title: The Dark Worlds of James Herbert by Pan Macmillan
item.content:encoded: Explore the fabled works of award-winning author James Herbert with the latest Humble Book Bundle. Feast your eyes on The Fog, the international bestseller that has haunted readers since 1975 with its reality-based horror story centered on a madness-inducing fog. Devour The Rats, praised by Stephen King: "The Rats is splatterpunk deluxe. Not only great, gory fun but a prime example of what was once called 'the British nasty.'" Thwart the neo-Nazis’ world-ending plot to use the Spear of Longinus in The Spear—read these iconic James Herbert titles and much more today.

item.title: The Ethical Hacking & Cyber Defense Bundle by Packt
item.content:encoded: Turn your curiosity about computer hacking into a fast-paced, proven, and ethical career with our latest collaboration with tech experts at Packt. Pay what you want for industry-leading instruction from courses like Agentic AI for Offensive Cybersecurity, Linux Shell Scripting for Hackers, and A Day in the Life of a CISO, all designed to help you combat bad hackers and secure your slice of cyberspace. Deepen your understanding whether you’re a novice or a seasoned professional, and help support The Global FoodBanking Network!

item.title: Woodworking, Turning, and Carving by Taunton Press / Abrams
item.content:encoded: Embrace an analog lifestyle and learn a new skill with this bundle of woodworking how-to guides from Taunton Press! Learn the woodworking basics that will bring your wood-based ideas to life, whether it’s a new piece of furniture, a beautiful cabinet, or a set of expertly turned chair legs, with The Why & How of Woodworking: A Simple Approach to Making Meaningful Work! Build the perfect box with Taunton's Complete Illustrated Guide to Box Making! Turn your kitchen into the galley of your dreams with Bookcases, Cabinets & Built-Ins! Use your new skills to build whatever your home, office, or studio requires, and support BINC with your purchase of this bundle at the price of you choosing!

item.title: The Best of Joe Hill by IDW
item.content:encoded: Find delight in the fright with our star-studded collection of Joe Hill works by IDW Publishing! Unlock 15 outstanding titles guaranteed to excite and fright. Highlighted by The Cape, a haunting story of childhood joy twisting into an adulthood of pain; Thumbprint, the tale of a broken veteran battling with the decisions of her past; and the fantasy murder mystery title Locke & Key Vol. 1: Welcome to Lovecraft, this bundle delivers an epic collection of amazing reads. Pay what you want for an epic bundle of amazing reads and help support The BINC Foundation with your purchase!

item.title: The World of Fateforge Megabundle by Studio Agate
item.content:encoded: An epic bundle of gorgeous original art, thrilling engagements, and countless hours of gameplay has arrived with Fateforge. Your adventures through this comprehensive 5th edition library will transport your party through the grandiose landscapes of Eana, filled with colorful civilizations and exotic locations like the bustling Free City. Strategize with your party to defeat the demon princes from the Melancholian Moon and the brutal barbarian lords of the Kaani Hordes to bring peace to the realm. Discover Studio Agate’s award-winning Fateforge series before it’s gone and help support the charity ComicBooks For Kids!.

item.title: Python Programming by Wiley
item.content:encoded: Build websites and software, automate tasks, analyze data, and more using Python—the star of our latest Tech Book Bundle with Wiley. Get building-block courses like The Python Book and a massive collection from the For Dummies series like Python for Data Science For Dummies, 3e and Python Essentials For Dummies. Python’s easy-to-use interface is approachable yet powerful enough to tackle a wide range of complex tasks. Everything you need to dip your toes into programming languages is here in one bundle—pay what you want and help support the Python Foundation with your purchase!

item.title: The Systems-Minded Software Engineer by Packt
item.description: Learn the hottest systems-minded engineering techniques
item.content:encoded: Become a subject matter expert on a variety of systems with The Systems-Minded Software Engineer Bundle! Master the art of writing efficient programs, learn how to create layered designs for Ruby on Rails applications, and start creating software architecture patterns for serverless systems—all in one bundle! Unlock 20+ expert-led courses from Packt including Domain-Driven Refactoring, Clean Architecture with Python, and Platform Engineering for Architects. Never stop learning and never overpay for professional-quality instruction when you shop with Humble Bundle.

item.title: Tony and Anne Hillerman: The Leaphorn, Chee & Manuelito Novels
item.content:encoded:
If you enjoy mystery fiction, atmospheric novels about the American Southwest, or have suddenly found yourself obsessed with the show Dark Winds, you’re going to want to check out this bundle of Tony and Anne Hillerman’s Leaphorn & Chee detective books! Start with The Blessing Way and get acquainted with Navajo Tribal Police Lieutenant Joe Leaphorn and a homicide investigation that reeks of evil. Follow along as he solves the violent crimes in Dance Hall of the Dead, and Listening Woman, and later meets his partners Jim Chee and Bernadette Manuelito, instrumental in solving the cases at the heart of Spider Woman’s Daughter and Rock with Wings. Enjoy all 30 of these ebooks for the price of your choice, and support Trees, Water & People with your purchase!

The titles in this bundle are available through Kobo.com. To access the content, create or log in to your Kobo.com account.

item.title: Cozy Afghans and More: Crochet Patterns and Projects by Leisure Arts and C&T
item.description: Get Ice Box Crochet, Easy Rugs to Crochet, Learn to Crochet Now! and more!
item.content:encoded: Crochet divas and granny square baddies, don’t miss out on this fantastic bundle full of patterns and inspo for the crochet projects of your wildest dreams! We’ve teamed up with Leisure Arts to bring you crafting idea ebooks that will get your hooks moving! Learn how to make miniature crochet food in the tradition of amigurumi with Ice Box Crochet! Discover that granny squares literally have no limit with 99 Granny Squares to Crochet! Get started on your crochet journey with Learn How to Crochet Now! Craft some award-winning creations with Contest Favorites Mile-A-Minute Afghans! There’s so much more to add to your crochet skill set in this 26-ebook bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support One Tree Planted with your purchase!

item.title: EC Comics: The Resurrection Bundle by Oni Press
item.description: You’ve never seen horror like this before
item.content:encoded: The name EC Comics strikes fear into the hearts of its fans for one simple reason: these tales of the undead, unexplained, and altogether unholy are unlike anything even the gnarliest horror aficionado has ever witnessed. That’s why we’ve collected the very best into one convenient bundle to amuse and horrify! Enjoy (if you dare) the terrors and trials of Catacomb of Torment! Travel (if you can muster up the courage) to the distant worlds and blood-soaked shores of Cruel Universe! Peruse (if you can stomach the thought) the chronicles of monsters and madness in Epitaphs from the Abyss! All of these series and more are included in this bundle of frights and phantoms, so add these horror stories to your necronomicon while you can, and support the Comic Book Legal Defense Fund with your purchase. It may be your laaaaaast!

item.title: Interfacing with Machine Learning by O'Reilly
item.description: Interface with AI in no time
item.content:encoded: Curious about machine learning, LLMs, or design apps? Get familiar with our latest Book bundle: Interfacing with Machine Learning by O'Reilly. Perfect for beginners and beyond—start your journey with 10+ expertly crafted courses like Hands-On Large Language Models: Language Understanding and Generation, AI and ML for Coders in PyTorch, and more. Deepen your understanding whether you’re a novice or a seasoned professional, and help support Code for America with your purchase. Don’t wait—pay what you want and start executing faster than your competitors today!

item.title: Visual Design & Branding Mastery by Quarto
item.content:encoded: Redefine your personal brand or develop a fresh visual language for clients with the Visual Design & Branding Mastery Bundle. Unlock Made By James, a set of courses and tools for graphic designers to grow their creativity and their audience, Making and Breaking the Grid, an essential guide to the mechanics of grid building, Universal Principles of Design, the 101-level masterclass to everything design, and more. Pay what you want for expert-led instruction and help support The ACLU with your purchase!

item.title: Love and Rockets and More: The Collected Hernandez Bros. by Fantagraphics
item.description: Magical realism meets the alt comic scene
item.content:encoded: Lovers of comics, fantasy, and any combination of the two will want to check out this comprehensive collection of everything published by the Hernandez brothers! The prolific trio is best known for their Love and Rockets series, which is included here in its entirety, plus Love and Rockets: The Covers and Love and Rockets: The Sketchbooks. (And if you’re a newbie to the series, we recommend starting with The Love and Rockets Primer!) But that’s not all: We’ve also included Maggie the Mechanic, Proof That the Devil Loves You, and Psychodrama Illustrated, along with a ton of other miniseries and one-shots to choose from. Pay what you want for the full Hernandez brothers experience, and support the ACLU with your purchase!

item.title: Dread & Darkness: A Horror Megabundle by Open Road Media
item.description: Don’t read these with the lights off
item.content:encoded: Horror fans, we’ve got quite the bundle for you. If you’ve been searching for a really good, really spooky, really frightening novel—or two, or three, or fifty—our latest bundle includes a whole library of classic and modern horror fiction from Open Road Media! Shiver and shake at the spooky short stories in Brian Lumley’s Fruiting Bodies and Other Fungi! Experience the true horrors in the source material in John Ajvide Lindqvist’s Let Me In! Discover an urban fantasy populated by old gods and guys with rodent superpowers in China Miéville’s debut novel King Rat! There’s even more to enjoy, including classics by horror veterans like Richard Matheson and Robert McCammon, as well as new favorites from Stephen Graham-Jones and John Shirley, so grab this bundle while you can and support Save the Children with your purchase!

item.title: LLM and Agentic AI Career Accelerator Bundle by Packt
item.content:encoded: Learn how to create your own LLMs and agents that understand, generate, and process human-like text by analyzing massive datasets using deep learning. Inside this 20+ course library, you’ll gain expert insights from practical lessons like Learn Python Programming, 4E and the LLM Engineer's Handbook. These massively efficient tools save you time and effort so you can prioritize other important tasks and systems. Get the very best tech courses powered by the pros at Packt and help support World Central Kitchen with your purchase!
